entry.title: Re: Filter Value help results in Child entity based on pa...
entry.content:
Hi @TharinduW i have the similar requrirement and tried to define the @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition annotation with additional binding of the parent entity but still value help filter doesn't work. Please can you explain if it worked for you ?

Scenario : I have a child entity with draft defined as composition. When creating entries for child using create button there is a popup with value help whole values needs to be filtered based on parent entrity key value.

entry.title: Re: Need help on FD10N open item warning
entry.content:
Hi, Thanks for the reply.

But I cross checked with flb5n open items too, all the 39 items are normal items only. No parked or special gl items. 

How can we proceed further?

entry.title: API/connector between SuccessFactor and Ariba Procurement
entry.content:
Dear to whom it concern. I'm a S-CSM located in Spain and one of my customers is asking to me if there is some API/Connector between SuccessFactor and Ariba Procurement? what they want to do is: At present in Teva, Successfactor is sending to Ariba, though Oracle GLB, the shared users data. Our plan is to descope Oracle for the user files. We are looking to take HR data directly from Successfactor and push it to Ariba. Can you help me to find if there is any standard API or any prepackaged solution or interface between success factor and Ariba for HR data?

With some internal support I answered the following: There is no API that I am aware of for this…once the customer begins using IAS for authentication and Ariba adopts that, it should take care of the entire user provisioning and user authentication. The customer could look at the SCIM API as a replacement, but there are some limitations with this API at the moment. Below you have the link about the SCIM API: https://help.sap.com/docs/ariba-apis/sap-ariba-scim-api-b3330550673e4208a0300f524f5b8104/sap-ariba-scim-api but it seems it doesn't work. So if one of you knows a similiar use case and can share it with me would be more than appreciated. Or if you know a customer who could do something on their own. Please let me know. Thanks

entry.title: Re: messageLogFactory Vs MessageLogFactory in CPI Groovy scripting
entry.content: Looks like more information about the two is here: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/add-information-to-message-processing-log

entry.title: Re: I need to change the tax rate set on the purchase ord...
entry.content:
Hola,

Mira esa Nota SAP 2424664 - Master Data set-up for Tax Code in SAP TM and ERP - SAP for Me tienes el paso a paso de como funciona en TM/MM la determinación, pero básicamente tienes una secuencia de accesso en la Tx ML36.

Saludos

entry.title: Re: What do MTO & MTS REALLY mean?
entry.content:
Hi there! Master planner using SAP eppds. I think the issue comes down to understanding the definitions. Sometimes SAP will define a material one way, while in the production world the same word could be defined differently. If you are a consultant but have never spent time actually in Supply Chain doing the job, I challenge you by pay close attention to the processes of the business and for clarification to the definitions. I have been through several implementations of SAP one where the business told the SAP team that they were MTO. That was not actually case, but their business made unique SKU's for all of their customers even though their BOM's where the same. So naturally the SAP team set all of the required data up as MTO. In 3 months, we were back updating the data in the system. Take the time to understand what the business is defining. Sometimes it might not be the same definition that SAP has defined. Great article by the way! 

Kind regards,

entry.title: Re: How can I get an SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP BTP Extension Developer certificatio
entry.content:
Hi @Margit_Wagner Margit, 

I greatly appreciate your quick feedback and guidance.

Okay, I get it. I'll do that then.

Best Regards,

FAFR

How should I proceed?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Need help on FD10N open item warning
entry.content:
Hello again dear user,

Can you please provide either screenshots or a Word file with explicit description so I can keep going with the analysis ?

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Where can I enhance their understanding of omnichannel strategies and pricing?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing learning journey.

Overview
This learning is designed for professionals looking to enhance their understanding of omnichannel strategies and pricing. 
This course is ideal for pricing managers, and IT professionals who want to learn how to leverage SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing to overcome market challenges and improve customer engagement. Participants will gain insights into market trends, explore various services and functionalities, and understand the integration and setup processes. The course includes practical simulations and quizzes to reinforce learning, ensuring participants can apply their knowledge effectively in real-world scenarios.

Learning objectives

  1. Understand market trends and business challenges.
  2. Explore SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing services and functionalities.
  3. Evaluate the business value of SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing.
  4. Learn about integrations and setup.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: EC Promotion - Promote link in worksheet is not avail...
entry.content:
Hi @Rodrigo_Lopes 

Try making the promotion standard field editable in the template. If I remember correctly that's the issue. Or maybe you are missing one of the required standard fields but I think your list looks good especially since you got it from a previous thread.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Condition contract management set different document...
entry.content:
Hi @Hadjolian ,

Yes, this is possible. In SAP Settlement Management, the number range for Settlement Documents is determined by the Settlement Document Type (field TMFK-NUMKI). This allows you to assign different number ranges for accrual documents and partial/final settlement documents.

From the FI side, you can configure whether the corresponding accounting document number range is internal or external, depending on your requirements.

That said, based on your recent posts, it seems you've just started working hands-on with SAP CCM over the past couple of weeks. That's great—and I’d encourage you to continue exploring! However, I would also recommend taking some time to review the standard SAP documentation, configuration guides, and best practices provided by SAP. These materials cover many of the foundational topics that have come up in your questions.

While it's always good to ask the community, please try to avoid posting multiple basic questions that can be answered through documentation and testing. You'll get much more value out of SAP CCM by experimenting in the system and understanding how the different components interact.

If possible, I’d also suggest connecting with someone more experienced in SAP CCM within your organization. Having a knowledgeable colleague to guide you through the core concepts can be incredibly helpful early on.

Regards, 
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: clarifications about HANA MONOTORING in single AND MDC modes in regards to CPU
entry.content:
clarifications about HANA MONOTORING in single AND MDC modes in regards to CPU


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: clarifications about HANA MONOTORING in single AND MD...
entry.content:
For Memory and CPU Usage for Tenant Databases you can check document below 

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_PLATFORM/6b94445c94ae495c83a19646e7c3fd56/4a16cd3b5d804008b5f3dec5188b3560.html

entry.title: Re: Dimension labels not shown (treemap, heatmap)
entry.content: For the data labels (so the once in your Treemap, not axis labels like in the Heatmap) you can to disable the option "Avoid Data Label Overlap" in the styling panel of the chart. This should help displaying more labels even thought they might overlap.

entry.title: Having an issue calling BOPF multi Node instance ACTION via OData Model Functionimport
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

we have a scenario to call a BOPF Multi Node Instance Action(Approval) for the Invoices from FIORI List report application, we were successfully able to use the ODatamodel FunctionImport method for the single node BOPF->CDS View instance however when trying to use the MultiNode instance of the BOPF action, end up into error, Kindly guide what would be the best way to have the ODatamodel function Import method handling Multi Node Instance BOPF action.

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay final pay out calculations
entry.content:
Hi @Olga_Skarla 

It's hard to explain Variable Pay on so many levels but I'll give you some tips and links so you can understand on your own.

  • First of all you should have decimals in your Proration % : instead of 2 and 98, you should see 2.43 or 98.45 to make Prorated Target Amounts accurate. The fix as well as an explanation of how the % are calculated are explained here (see the link to the excel spreadsheet) : https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/proration-and-number-formats-in-variable-pay/ba-p/13493769
  • The fact that you have an Assignment Basis at 0 in your second screenshots means that somehow on those dates the employee doesn't have any relevant information (no salary or target bonus %) in their profile. You should be able to confirm that by going to Edit Employee History.
  • As per previous discussions here I believe, custom budget will not return the right results in Variable Pay especially not on the spent. Budget is meant to on Results and pointing to the Calculated Target Amount for the individual section. 

 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Having an issue calling BOPF multi Node instance ACTI...
entry.content: Multi-node actions are totally doable—it’s all about structuring the input correctly and ensuring BOPF/OData play nice with bulk data. If you’re still stuck, share the exact error (HTTP 400? 500?) and the BOPF action code. We’ll crack it! 🚀

entry.title: Re: Flag is raised even if salary is given within guidelines
entry.content:
Hi @satnaik18 

I've seen this issue before, it's linked to number formats and roundings. Basically you are showing one value but the system keeps the decimals in the back end and flags the employee.

Try copying the template, editing money and amount number formats to allow decimals and test and confirm it is not happening anymore, then revert slowly number format by format until you identify the guilty one.

All the best, 
Xavier

entry.title: 1H 2025 Product Release: Add a Note, View Notes, etc in Full Profile?
entry.content: With the new Full Profile, where do Managers and Employees view their Notes that were added using "Add a Note to..."? These are used by our organization in many departments.  When is this planned to be included in the Full Profile?  This is a mandatory feature in our organization.

entry.title: Re: Compensation – EC Entry Level Field Labels Not Visible
entry.content: @MariaCarlotaAbreu Can you please try with the .label or without .label extension and mark comp columns as reportable and translatable ?

entry.title: Re: New Pipeline Concept features: integrated runtimes and supporting landscape stages
entry.content:
"Generic inbound processing for XI supports both asynchronous and synchronous messaging"

Has anyone got this to work for Synchronous proxies?

My scenario works perfectly fine with:

Pipeline Template Step01 - Inbound Processing Synchronous
Pipeline Generic Step02 - Integrated Messaging Runtime Async
Pipeline Template Step07 - Outbound Processing Synchronous

but the same message with this configuration doesn't work:

Pipeline Generic Step01 - Inbound Processing for XI
Pipeline Generic Step02 - Integrated Messaging Runtime Async
Pipeline Template Step07 - Outbound Processing Synchronous 

ERP reports an empty response payload, even though the response message is visible in all the traces.
"Pipeline Generic Step01 - Inbound Processing for XI" is left at status "Processing" forever.

Regards

Steve

entry.title: Re: FTE and Proration examples in Compensation
entry.content: @urvashichaudhar not possible, customer would have to import % directly. Or looks at building rule in MDF or EC then map it to Comp.

Leandro, boa tarde!

Tudo na paz...

Me tira uma dúvida, como essa nota só irá sair 05/05, e já teremos solicitações nessa data, temos como realizar alguma saída contorno no SAP, para dar entrada nas informações? Criação das rubricas de desconto, lançamento no infotype 0015 alguma coisa desse tipo.

Me passa o link dessa BAdi.

Lhe agradeço,

entry.title: Re: FTE and Proration examples in Compensation
entry.content:
@mithunkumar724 

not possible, customer would have to import % directly. Or looks at building rule in MDF or EC then map it to Comp.

entry.title: Disaggregation from Month to Weeks in IBP - Integers Only
entry.content: Looking for a way to disaggregate to integer values only.  EX: A 4 week month has a cumulative forecast of 1 ea, so with current disaggregation method, each week gets 0.25 ea.  Is it possible to aggregate at the week level so a week does not get a value until a whole number has been accumulated or something similar?  Basically we don't want to do it by rounding, but need weeks to only contain whole numbers (or 0).

entry.title: How to Troubleshoot a HANA Live Report Performance Issue in S/4HANA with Complex CDS Views
entry.content:
I’ve built a custom HANA Live Report (using CDS views with @analytics.query: true) that combines data from MATDOC, VBAP, and custom Z-tables. The report works in development, but in production, it times out when users apply filters (e.g., date ranges, plant, material type). The CDS view uses complex joins, calculated fields, and @Aggregation.default: #SUM.

I've tried addig HANA indexes on key fields, simplifying the joins and using @Optimization.Filter.requiredFields. I've also tried EXPLAIN PLAN in HANA Studio, but the execution plan shows full table scans and checking SAP notes, but none address this specific scenario.

How do you identify bottlenecks in CDS views with nested aggregations? Are there HANA-specific optimizations (e.g., CE functions, column vs. row store) for large-scale MATDOC data? Could the issue be related to implicit client handling or authorization checks in CDS?

entry.title: Beyond the Spotlight: Powering Media Success Through Partnership
entry.content:
The media and entertainment industry thrives on spectacle—captivating audiences with powerful storytelling, stunning visuals, and immersive experiences. But behind the glitz, media companies face a different challenge: managing complex operations, changing consumption models, navigating tight margins, and ensuring long-term financial health.

That’s where SAP, AWS, and Vistex come in. Together, we’re helping media organizations optimize their operations, uncover new revenue streams, and build a smarter, more scalable business foundation. By combining intelligent cloud solutions with deep industry expertise, we empower media companies to balance creative excellence with operational efficiency.

Here’s how our partnership delivers real value where it matters most:

Project and Revenue Management: Keeping Productions Profitable

Delivering high-quality content on time and within budget requires more than creative vision—it demands financial and operational control. Outdated spreadsheets and siloed systems create inefficiencies, making it difficult to track costs, revenue, and project progress in real time.

With SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition on AWS, media companies gain full visibility into budgeting, resource allocation, and timelines. Automated billing and revenue management capabilities ensure that every dollar earned is accurately recorded, preventing revenue leakage. And with AWS providing seamless scalability, security, availability, and capabilities at every layer of the generative AI stack, companies can adjust their infrastructure as project demands fluctuate and innovate faster, without overburdening internal IT teams.

Talent Optimization: Aligning Workforce and Workflow

Success in media is built on creative talent—but managing workforce planning at scale is no easy task. Production teams need to ensure the right people are assigned to the right projects while maintaining a rewarding employee experience.

AI-driven workforce management tools analyze skills, availability, and past engagements to optimize talent allocation. By consolidating all workforce data into a single platform, companies can make informed staffing decisions and boost efficiency. Beyond logistics, analyzing employee sentiment helps organizations fine-tune policies, improve retention, and ensure a motivated, engaged workforce—especially for freelancers and contingent talent, who are critical to production success.

Rights and Royalties: Turning IP into Revenue

Content ownership and licensing are key revenue drivers, yet many media companies struggle with fragmented rights management systems that leave money on the table. With content distribution growing more complex, media businesses need a streamlined, automated way to track rights, licensing agreements, and royalty payments.

SAP Rights and Royalty Management by Vistex —brings end-to-end visibility and automation to rights tracking. "We are excited to offer this cloud solution to our customers," says Richard Whittington, Global Head of Media, Sports, Entertainment, and Communications at SAP. "It provides greater control over rights and royalties while maximizing revenue from licensing deals."

Amos Biegun, CEO of Vistex, adds, "The rights business is the lifeblood of a media company. Together with SAP and AWS, we’re giving our customers the flexibility to scale and manage their dynamic rights and royalties’ business."

By integrating rights management with financial systems, media organizations can ensure accurate payouts and uncover new monetization models—whether through streaming, syndication, or global distribution deals.

Scalability and Insights: A Future-Ready Media Business

As the industry evolves, media companies need a technology infrastructure that grows with them. Our partnership provides a unified platform that connects financial, operational, and creative workflows—empowering companies with the real-time insights needed to make smarter decisions.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition on AWS delivers financial transparency, cost efficiency, and project profitability tracking. Integrated AI-driven analytics provide insights into customer engagement, content performance, and operational effectiveness. AWS brings scalability, supporting media businesses as they expand into new regions or optimize post-production workflows. "AWS works with strategic partners like SAP to help media companies move faster and be smarter about creating, distributing and monetizing their offerings," says Christoph Streubert, Worldwide Business Development Manager at AWS. "This partnership ensures our customers have the scalability and flexibility to succeed."

Strong Foundations for Sustainable Growth

Creativity is at the heart of media—behind every great production is a strong business and infrastructure foundation. By streamlining operations, optimizing talent management, and maximizing rights revenue, media companies can unlock new growth opportunities while maintaining financial stability.

With SAP, AWS, and Vistex working together, media businesses don’t have to choose between creativity and operational excellence—they can achieve both. The companies that master this balance will be best positioned to captivate audiences, strengthen margins, and drive long-term success in an increasingly digital, global media landscape.

Want to learn more? Stop by and meet with us at the NAB show in Las Vegas on April 5-9 at Booth W1159 and booth W1701 in the West Hall.

entry.title: Re: HCM Brasil: Crédito do Trabalhador - eConsignado
entry.content:
Olá @Moises_Fernandes 

O possível primeiro desconto desse novo empréstimo será aplicável somente na folha mensal de Maio/2025. Sendo assim, é possível aguardar a solução standard.

De qualquer forma, é permitido o uso de soluções de contorno como o infotipo 15.

A referência da BAdI você encontra no documento de deliverables disponível no Work Zone (https://workzone.one.int.sap/site#workzone-home&/groups/Sr0zPWokOUR8i9WdA6q4Vs/documents/UljPHDzJrQJ2r3FvjRbsAy/slide_viewer).

entry.title: Signavio Standard Recordings
entry.content:
Someone sent me a link to what looks like a library of standard content for Signavio (which I didn't know even existed). (https://sapsignavio.enable-now.cloud.sap/pub/2023salesplays/index.html#)

Would anyone know if it's possible to create it as a connect WS in SEN, similar to the S4 and SF content? 

Thx

entry.title: Work modes information - solution manager 7.2
entry.content:
Hi Support,

 

We are currently publishing the availability information in power BI dashboard using BW info provider in sap solution manager 7.2 (S1P).

 

We are using the BW info provider 0CCMPDATA//STDF/QD_AVAILABILITY_M to fetch the availability information for managed systems.

 

Similarly, we are looking for such info provider name, where we can fetch the work modes (planned downtime) information for managed systems.

 

Can you please help with the info provider that contains the work modes information in sap solution manager 7.2 for managed systems?

 

 

 

Thanks,

 

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Work modes information - solution manager 7.2
entry.content:
Dear Customer

We can suggest the query “0SMD_WMM_AVAIL_HOUR” (Availability in hours) to get downtime information.

The input parameter list looks like below, where you can filter the output based on a timeframe. 0SMD_V_TIHM is one of the input parameters. If you want to filter based on any other parameters such as System ID, then you mention it as a filter value.

 

The output of the query should contains 3 fields:

 

Unplanned Downtime

Non-Availability Due to Downtime: The time when the system was actually brought down

Total Downtime: Total scheduled downtime of a system

 

Please refer to the method “cl_aiccmsbi_wmm_reporting_as->get_bw_downtime” where you can go through the use of the query “0SMD_WMM_AVAIL_HOUR” for reference.

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Signavio Standard Recordings
entry.content: I don't have an answer to your question but that's a useful library. Thanks for sharing!

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA dimension labels
entry.content:
Hi,

but see the following: if I added to your query condition (WHERE BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE.INTERNAL_ID = '17') it returned 0 records. But in case I added condition (WHERE JOB_INFO.BUSINESS_UNIT = '17') this will return 1 row. This means there is no Business Unit in the BUSINESS_UNIT MDF meet the conditions. My internal feeling is that questionable condition is where effective end date should be equals to '9999-12-31'. Please check.

Best Regards,

Marian

entry.title: S4 HANA Cloud Private, Standard Intracompany STO vs CAL Intracompany STO
entry.content:
Hi all,

We require to use the Intracompany STO process in S4 HANA Private Cloud, our understanding we can perform the corresponding configurations and carry on the Intracompany STO process, our question raises related using CAL instance (Cloud Appliance Library) ready to run and preconfigured for Intracompany STO process.

What are the differences between Intracompany STO process with corresponding standard configuration and using CAL STO process instance into S4 Hana Private Cloud for Intracompany?

Can we use for our target system (production system) the Intracompany STO process with corresponding standard configuration or it is mandatory to use CAL instance for Intracompany STO process?

Thanks for your comments

entry.title: IDoc Retry Not Processing New Segments After Enhancement - How to Debug
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We’re facing an issue with a custom IDoc type (ZINVOIC02) that’s used to send invoices from S/4HANA (2021) to an external legacy system. The IDoc worked flawlessly until we added a new custom segment (Z1INV_DETAIL) to include tax-specific fields.

After adding the segment, the IDoc fails in the legacy system due to a format mismatch (error: "Segment Z1INV_DETAIL not expected"). When we retry the IDoc via BD87 or Fiori IDoc Monitor, the system does not pick up the corrected IDoc structure. It keeps sending the old version (without Z1INV_DETAIL). The new structure is active in WE30/WE31, and manual tests via WE19 work when we create the IDoc from scratch.

Why does the retry process ignore the updated IDoc structure? Are there hidden buffers or tables that store the original IDoc metadata? Has anyone encountered this with custom segments? Are there SAP notes (e.g., related to EDIDC/EDIDD tables) that address this?

Any insights or debugging steps would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: I need to change the tax rate set on the purchase ord...
entry.content: Gracias, solo que esta nota incluye rutas para SAP R3, y este problema es en SAP S4 HANA, las rutas son diferentes. Aun no logro cambiar el dato del impuesto.

entry.title: Re: I need to change the tax rate set on the purchase ord...
entry.content:
La nota aplica a S/4HANA tbn, mira eses blogs:

SAP Transportation Management for T&L for SAP S/4H... - SAP Community

SAP Transportation Management for T&L for SAP S/4H... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: QUEUE_NOT_EMPTY in CHECK_REQUIREMENTS phase in patch...
entry.content:
Hi Ratna,

please follow the KBA 3142237 - SPAM: BUFFER_NOT_EMPTY in CHECK_REQUIREMENTS phase

 

Best regards,

Laszlo

entry.title: Re: CAP8 with node.js : how to solve dependency issues
entry.content: main package.json and package.json of config_systemkind app added.

entry.title: Re: Unintended line breaks when using code samples
entry.content: Nice, thank you! (I'll check whenever I can)

entry.title: Re: display fiori elements draft edit status in listreport
entry.content: I'm currently not using semantic key. Using annotations, it should be available to display draft info independently from semantic key column. I have found a custom solution which made a lot of efforts to get it done. Maybe this could be improved via more @Common annontations especially for draft information like userid, date of last change bound to related adminstrative draft fields.

entry.title: How to update Section Code for Posted Document: SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to explain the process we are following.

We are using the Journal Entry API to post Supplier Invoices due to certain limitations in the Supplier Invoice Advanced API. However, since this is a JV API, we are unable to input the section code field during posting via API. Additionally, we have only one section code: 1000.

We need a solution to address this limitation through either of the following approaches:

  1. Updating the posted document to include the section code 1000.

  2. Setting the section code as a default value (1000) for all supplier transactions.

I would appreciate your expert guidance on this. Please assist.

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Re: How to configure a dynamic file upload in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Everyone, please vote here to get more attention and priority to this issue, because the static (and empty) columns in upload files are really not user friendly enough. And still nothing seems planned on the roadmap yet.
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/331943

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: IDOC Extension
entry.content: I guess your code is wrong, or you are doing something that is not supported by standard.

entry.title: Numeración en certificado de retención
entry.content:
Buenos dias estimados expertos,

tengo una duda con respecto a los certificados de retencion (Carta Certificada) que emite SAP B1 cuando se efectura el pago de una factura de proveedor que aplica retencion, en nuestro pais este certificado debe llevar un numero, similar a una factura que lleva un numero unico, revisando en el area donde se crean las series de numeracion de todos los documentos veo que no esta el apartado para los certificados de retencion, de que otra manera se le puede asignar una numeracion a esos certificados?

 

De antemano agradezco su apoyo,

 

Saludos Cordiales

entry.title: SAP BODS Cloud Migration
entry.content:
Hi,

We are planning to migrate our BODS application with Lift and Shift approach from;

Current Environment:

  • Operating Model: On-Premises
  • Operating System: Windows Server 2019
  • BI Application: SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.2 Support Pack 9
  • Oracle Database: Oracle Database 19c Standard Edition 2 Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production

Target Environment:

  1. Operating Model: Azure Cloud
  2. Operating System: Window 2019
  3. Data Service: Information Platform Service (IPS) 4.3 SP04
  4. Database: Oracle Database 19c Standard Edition 2 Release 19.0.0.0.0 - Production   
  5. There are other application files and scripts are being managed and stored in the BODS servers, which are required to run their processes

Please help to understand how to proceed and what are the pros and cons of this approach.

Thanks,

Muhammad Hameedullah

entry.title: Re: DP background job - invalid data status
entry.content: Hello Ramesh,

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Theme Change in SAP UI5 Applications.

Wonderful blog, 

Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: DP background job - invalid data status
entry.content: Hello Everyone, We have similar Production issue where we ran this /SAPAPO/TS_LCM_CONS_CHECK program in background and issue has been resolved. I hope this will help someone to narrow down this issue.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA dimension labels
entry.content: Hi Marian, I am not sure this is relevant here. 1 - I am missing the labels, the IDs pull through just fine and I can also validate the HC number is correctly distributed to the unlabeled nodes. 2 - the effective end date condition is from the SQL examples from the old group and as far as I know they are used to pull the correct current record if there are historical records in the mdf object 3 - I don t know why your line (WHERE BUSINESS_UNIT_CODE.INTERNAL_ID = '17' would return 0 as I have checked and the IDs are properly matched - attaching screenshots

entry.title: Guided Development and Page Map Will Not Load - a.Label.replace is not a function
entry.content:
Hello.

I'm facing an issue in a Fiori Elements app that seems to be related with labels assigned through a path.

I defined some sections (UI.ReferenceFacet) in the annotations.xml file and assigned the label from a field that was available, for example:

<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
    <PropertyValue Property="Label" Path="SubTab01_Name" />
    <PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="TabToTable01/@UI.LineItem"/>
    <Annotation Term="UI.Hidden" Path="Hide_SubTab01"/>
</Record>

Some facts:

  1. The assignment does work and I see the correct title for the section. (1)
  2. If the Label property is there, none of those tools will work. I will get a "TypeError: a.Label.replace is not a function" in the output tab. (2)
  3. The moment I remove that Label line, the error is gone and the tools are back on.
  4. The number of sections don't seem to influence anything.

(1)

(2)

What could it be?

Thanks, Marcos.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA user not being captured
entry.content: Found him - it seems there was some issue in his user ID so when searching for him he wouldn t show up because his user ID is actually his name - strange

entry.title: analytics-cloud-export-api-wrapper: error when connecting to the SAC tenant
entry.content:
I'm getting the following error when executing 

sac.connect(<clientID>, <appSecret>)
WARNING.  Failed to connect to https://sac-tenant.us20.sapanalytics.cloud/api/v1/dataimport/models and fell back on https://sac-tenant.us20.sapanalytics.cloud/api/v1/dataexport/providers/sac, to read the model catalog.  No CSRF token is available from this endpoint, so import operations will not be possible.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
JSONDecodeError                           Traceback (most recent call last)
File ~\Documents\WinPython\WPy64-31241\notebooks\sacapi\sacapi.py:230, in SACConnection.getProviders(self)
    228     print(warningMsg)
--> 230 responseJson = json.loads(response.text)
    231 for provData in responseJson["value"]:

File ~\Documents\WinPython\WPy64-31241\python-3.12.4.amd64\Lib\json\__init__.py:346, in loads(s, cls, object_hook, parse_float, parse_int, parse_constant, object_pairs_hook, **kw)
    343 if (cls is None and object_hook is None and
    344         parse_int is None and parse_float is None and
    345         parse_constant is None and object_pairs_hook is None and not kw):
--> 346     return _default_decoder.decode(s)
    347 if cls is None:

File ~\Documents\WinPython\WPy64-31241\python-3.12.4.amd64\Lib\json\decoder.py:337, in JSONDecoder.decode(self, s, _w)
    333 """Return the Python representation of ``s`` (a ``str`` instance
    334 containing a JSON document).
    335 
    336 """
--> 337 obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end())
    338 end = _w(s, end).end()

File ~\Documents\WinPython\WPy64-31241\python-3.12.4.amd64\Lib\json\decoder.py:355, in JSONDecoder.raw_decode(self, s, idx)
    354 except StopIteration as err:
--> 355     raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None
    356 return obj, end

JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:

AttributeError                            Traceback (most recent call last)
Cell In[6], line 2
      1 # 2 Setup authentication
----> 2 sac.connect('client_id', 'client_secret')

File ~\Documents\WinPython\WPy64-31241\notebooks\sacapi\sacapi.py:472, in SACConnection.connect(self, clientID, clientSecret)
    470     raise re
    471 except Exception as e:
--> 472     raise e

File ~\Documents\WinPython\WPy64-31241\notebooks\sacapi\sacapi.py:466, in SACConnection.connect(self, clientID, clientSecret)
    464 try:
    465     self.getAccessToken(clientID, clientSecret)
--> 466     self.getProviders()
    467 except OAuthError as oa:
    468     raise oa

File ~\Documents\WinPython\WPy64-31241\notebooks\sacapi\sacapi.py:257, in SACConnection.getProviders(self)
    255 except Exception as e:
    256     errorMsg = "Unknown error during provider (model) calatog read."
--> 257     if e.status_code:
    258         errorMsg = "%s  Status code %s from server.  %s" %(errorMsg, e.status_code, e.error)
    259         raise RESTError(errorMsg)

AttributeError: 'JSONDecodeError' object has no attribute 'status_code'

I would appreciate any help or pointers. Thanks! MJ

entry.title: Re: Want to simulate the transactional data of the Quick...
entry.content:
You're very welcome, Chandra!

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: Re: call unbound RAP action from CAP
entry.content:
In RAP you can declare actions only inside a behavior of an entity. That's why there are only bound actions. The difference here is that we have static actions as well. They are kind of unbound (i.e. they don't require a context) but at the same time they are bound (i.e. they are defined inside an entity). This results in a little confusing URL syntax:

<SERVICE>/<ENTITY_SET>/<NAMESPACE>.<ACTION>

e.g. /sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrder/com.sap.gateway.srvd_a2x.api_purchaseorder_2.v0001.MarkAsDeleted

entry.title: Performance Calibration Implementation Effort
entry.content:
Hello Community Members,

We are looking to implement Performance Calibration in SuccessFactors. We have Performance Mgmt, Compensation Mgmt and Succession Mgmt already implemented and operational within SuccessFactors.

At a high level, how much time should we budget for this implementation, if we go all standard with little/no customization?

Any guidance/input on this will be really appreciated. 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Stay certified due
entry.content: Hi, Faced the same issue. What you need to do is to reach out to SAP support and ask them to delete your other UID. That will delete your company UID and not your SID and PIDs, later link it to your personal UID.

entry.title: Re: Fieldglass Rates 2.0 Custom Lookup Question
entry.content:
Hi @Sam_R @RitaMCarrico , 

The 'Valid On' dates is utilized to control the timing of when rate/ rate component values are applicable. Should you require further assistance,  kindly submit a case to our App Support through SAP for Me or the SAP Fieldglass Help Center.

 

Join the SAP Fieldglass Product Success Work Zone – your one-stop shop for all things SAP Fieldglass where you’ll find Content Guides, Enablement Videos, Learning Resources, Release Information, Blogs, Webinars, and more.

entry.title: Re: HowTo: S4H Public Cloud app to start iFlow in SAP CPI by enduser.
entry.content: Nice use case, comments appreciated, if anyone having idea.

entry.title: Balance in transaction currency is too large for automatic correction
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm facing a problem with the Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous) API in an SAP Public Cloud environment. I developed it based on a community post (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/guidelines-for-api-journal-entry-clearing-asynchronous/ba-p/13410748), and I'm receiving the following error: 'Balance in transaction currency BRL 1,157.74- is too large for automatic correction.'

I've tried making various adjustments, modifying the payload, and only had success when I performed a partial clearing with 0.01 (where I believe there's some tolerance the system has when validating the balance).

Has anyone used this API or experienced a similar problem when clearing documents?

These are some links I used as references in this development:

  • Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous) Documentation
  • Guidelines for API Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous)

Best Regards,

Marcelo

entry.title: Connect SAP Datasphere to SAP RISE
entry.content: If I need to connect SAP Datasphere to SAP RISE, do I need a dpagent connection? SAP Rise is hosted on Google as a database.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Internal Cross LoBs Enablement Sessions
entry.content:
In early March, we successfully launched our inaugural Enablement sessions on SAP Cloud ALM, tailored for various internal teams at SAP Brazil. Our aim was to harness and integrate insights from diverse business areas, particularly the project, support, and delivery teams, to enhance their use of SAP Cloud ALM in forthcoming projects.

The sessions spanned a lively three days, hosting over 20 participants in person at SAP Labs and approximately 35 others tuning in remotely, culminating in a vibrant exchange among 60 to 65 attendees.

A big thank you to the 17 lines of business that actively engaged and enriched the sessions, and to my team for their meticulous attention to detail that ensured the event's success.

entry.title: Re: IDoc Basics For Functional Consultants
entry.content:
Really well done. 

Useful I also find transaction WLF_IDOC. 

Helps a lot for searching IDOCs by content.

entry.title: Re: Balance in transaction currency is too large for auto...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

I've never faced such issue before but I might find a solution to your issue.

Can you flag the checkbox “FX Rate First Item” in the app “Edit Options for Journal Entries - My Settings" and proceed again ?

Hope this will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Having an issue calling BOPF multi Node instance ACTI...
entry.content:
Good Afternoo
My Name is Raquel - Brazil

Yes! In the SAP R/3 system, you can create line charts using the SAP standard graphical class or by exporting data to Excel for visualization.

Options to Create a Line Chart in SAP R/3:

1️⃣ Using the cl_gui_chart_engine Class (SAP GUI Graph)

SAP provides the cl_gui_chart_engine class, which allows you to generate charts directly within the system.

Example of ABAP code using cl_gui_chart_engine:

 

abap
CopiarEditar
 
 

DATA: gr_chart TYPE REF TO cl_gui_chart_engine,
gr_container TYPE REF TO cl_gui_custom_container,
gt_data TYPE TABLE OF chart_sdata,
gs_data TYPE chart_sdata.

" Criar container para exibir o gráfico na tela
CREATE OBJECT gr_container
EXPORTING
container_name = 'GRAPH_CONTAINER'.

" Criar instância do gráfico
CREATE OBJECT gr_chart
EXPORTING
parent = gr_container.

" Adicionar dados ao gráfico
gs_data-value = 100.
gs_data-category = 'Jan'.
APPEND gs_data TO gt_data.

gs_data-value = 150.
gs_data-category = 'Fev'.
APPEND gs_data TO gt_data.

gs_data-value = 200.
gs_data-category = 'Mar'.
APPEND gs_data TO gt_data.

" Configurar o gráfico
gr_chart->set_data( EXPORTING dataset = gt_data ).
gr_chart->set_chart_type( EXPORTING chart_type = 'LINE' ).
gr_chart->refresh( ).

This code creates a line chart within a SAP GUI container.

2️⃣ Exporting to Excel and Creating the Chart There

If the chart is complex or needs to be viewed outside SAP, you can generate an ALV report, export the data to Excel (ALV -> Export -> Spreadsheet), and create the chart in Excel.

3️⃣ Alternative: Creating Charts in Fiori/SAP UI5

If the company is using SAP Fiori and S/4HANA, another option is to build a Fiori application with SAP UI5 and display charts using libraries like VizFrame Charts.

 

"Good luck!!
I hope I helped!!!" 🚀😊

entry.title: Re: Trigger event lost in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
As @Mell mentioned, the issue was resolved by the SAP side, by adding the WebHook-Request-Origin header to the requests for the webhook. To ensure failed messages are not lost, you can set the Quality of Service to 1 when creating a webhook subscription. With this setting, failed messages remain in the queue.

https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/create-webhook-subscription

If you want to try sending events to BPA from Postman, please set the following header parameters:

Content-Type: application/cloudevents+json

WebHook-Request-Origin: <The host part of messaging.uri in the event mesh's service key>  e.g., <subdomain>-<subaccountid>.eu10.a.eventmesh.integration.cloud.sap

entry.title: Re: HCM Brasil: Crédito do Trabalhador - eConsignado
entry.content: @leandrodavila, muito obrigado pelo retorno, vou informar ao pessoal aqui também passar o olho nessa BAdi.

entry.title: Re: How to create a line chart in R3
entry.content:
Boa tarde,
meu nome é Raquel Souza, 
sou do Brasil - Prazer em conhecê-lo.

Sim! No sistema SAP R/3 , você pode criar gráficos de linha usando a classe gráfica padrão SAP ou exportando dados para o Excel para visualização.

Opções para criar um gráfico de linhas no SAP R/3:

1️⃣ Usando uma classe cl_gui_chart_engine (SAP GUI Graph)

O SAP fornece uma classe cl_gui_chart_engine que permite gerar gráficos diretamente no sistema.

Exemplo de código ABAP usando cl_gui_chart_engine :

DADOS: gr_chart TIPO REF PARA cl_gui_chart_engine,
gr_container TIPO REF PARA cl_gui_custom_container,
gt_data TIPO TABELA DE chart_sdata,
gs_data TIPO chart_sdata.

" Crie um contêiner para exibir o gráfico na tela
CRIE OBJETO gr_container
EXPORTANDO
container_name = 'GRAPH_CONTAINER'.

" Crie uma instância do gráfico
CREATE OBJECT gr_chart
EXPORTING
parent = gr_container.

" Adicione dados ao gráfico
gs_data-value = 100.
gs_data-category = 'Jan'.
ANEXAR gs_data A gt_data.

gs_data-value = 150.
gs_data-category = 'fev'.
ANEXAR gs_data Um gt_data.

gs_data-value = 200.
gs_data-category = 'Mar'.
ANEXAR gs_data Um gt_data.

" Configurar o gráfico
gr_chart->set_data( EXPORTANDO dataset = gt_data ).
gr_chart->set_chart_type( EXPORTANDO chart_type = 'LINE' ).
gr_chart->refresh( ).

Este código cria um gráfico de linhas dentro de um contêiner SAP GUI.

2️⃣ Exportando para o Excel e criando o gráfico lá

Se o gráfico para complexo ou precisar ser visualizado fora do SAP, você pode gerar um relatório ALV , exportar os dados para o Excel ( ALV -> Export -> Spreadsheet ) e criar o gráfico no Excel.

3️⃣ Alternativa: Criando gráficos no Fiori/SAP UI5

Se uma empresa estiver usando SAP Fiori e S/4HANA , outra opção é construir um aplicativo Fiori com SAP UI5 e exibir gráficos usando bibliotecas como VizFrame Charts .
"Boa sorte!!
Espero ter ajudado!!!" 🚀😊

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Lessons Learned: Hybrid Development with On-Premise SAP System
entry.content:
Hi @SheldonS, 

You can find the host and port in the credentials information of the connectivity service bound to your application as shown below:

VCAP_SERVICES: {
  "connectivity": [{
    "credentials": {
      "onpremise_proxy_host": <host>,
      "onpremise_proxy_http_port": <port>
     }
  }]
}

entry.title: Vision1𝟏 ka Refe𝓻 cod𝚎 2025 March
entry.content: Use Code - WELCOME100

entry.title: Employee Central Check Tool Check for Job Information: Each user's history starts with a hire record
entry.content:
The event and employment status fields in Job Information are two of the most relevant fields across all of the Employee Central Core master data, because they represent what stage of the employment lifecycle the employee is in, and they control what can be done with the employee at which point in time.

The guardrails and additional validations that we introduced with Centralised Services ensure more consistent and reliable employee data. However, various customers still have inconsistent, older data in their systems that was created pre-Centralised Services, such as employees who do not have a hire record at all. We have had multiple requests to provide an easy way for customers to fix the issue of missing hire records.

With the 1H2025 release, we are introducing a new Check Tool Check which returns a list of all users without a hire record and contains a Quick Fix which modifies the first record in each of those users' Job Information history and updates the event reason with a "Hire" event reason that can be selected in the check.

The check has two parameters: Company and Event Reason.

If there is no association defined between event reason and country, the check and quick fix can be run for all impacted users, so you can leave the Company field blank. The Event Reason value help returns all “Hire” event reasons. This parameter is required because this is the event reason which will be used to update the impacted users’ data in the quick fix.

If there is an association between event reason and country, and you have “Hire” event reasons which are not associated to all countries, run the check separately for each company. The hire event reason you select must be one that is associated to the selected company’s country/region of registration, otherwise the check will return a validation error.

The check will now find all users without a hire record (if a company was selected, only for this company).

The quick fix will always be executed on all users in the results list. In addition to the event reason, it also updates the event in those records with the standard “Hire” event. It will not update the employment status in case a user had no status or had an incorrect status, because it would then need to process the user’s full Job Info History and propagate the status to future records until the next status-changing event, making it less performant.

The quick fix will also create a Job Information audit record to document the field changes. It will not update the "last modified/last updated" details; these will remain unchanged.

In case the results list contains users whose employment status in their very first Job Information record is blank, an additional step is required to completely fix their data. After executing the quick fix, go to the Job Info History for each of these users via their employee profile. Select their hire record, change any unrelated field (e.g. “Notes”), and save. This will derive the correct employment status in the hire record and also forward propagate it correctly.

This enhancement is inspired by the customer idea 311185.

entry.title: Re: Changing Button Color on click and keeping the color...
entry.content:
Hi @adityabehera2002 

You could achieve it through CSS.

Step 1

Create 2 CSS:

write your background color

Step 2

for Running button onClick event script:

this.setCssClass("button_status_color2");

for Closed button:

Running_Button.setCssClass("button_status_color");

 

Best regards,

I guess it will come in the notes and the config materials, will check best practices as well. I will further redirect my questions, seems here is more for troubleshooting.

entry.title: Error while using XML to CSV Out of the box SAP Solution in CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am trying to implement the out of the box solution by SAP to convert the XML structure to CSV.   In current SAP PO environment we have a Proxy to File interface. In SFTP module parameters we maintained the conversion parameters for converting to CSV.  I am following the package provided by SAP " MessageTransformBean - StructureXMLToPlain - TC2".  After updating the following parameters in the iFLow for conversion I am receiving the error given below:

xml.conversionType - StructXML2Plain
xml.processFieldNames - fromConfiguration
xml.recordsetName - Recordset
xml.recordsetStructure - Oildex_Electronic,Oildex_Electronic_Summary,Oildex_Electronic_Tran
xml.Oildex_Electronic.fieldFixedLengths - 1,2,6,4,7,8,18,4,7,10,12,10,10,11,12,1,6,3
xml.Oildex_Electronic_Summary.fieldFixedLengths - 1,2,10,18,10,12,10,10,11,12,33,3
xml.Oildex_Electronic_Tran.fieldFixedLengths - 1,2,10,10,12,97
xml.Oildex_Electronic.fieldNames - RecordType,CompanyCode,RunTicketDate,AccountingDate,RunTcketNumber,TankNumber,PropertyCode,CorrectedGravity,FieldPrice,NetVolume,AdjustmentValue1,TruckingCharges,StateTaxes,NetValue,AdjustmentIndicator,Blank,TransmissionDate
xml.Oildex_Electronic_Summary.fieldNames - RecordType,CompanyCode,RecordCount,Blank1,Netvolume,GrossValue,AdjustmentValue,TruckingCharges,StateTaxes,NetValue,Blank,TransmissionDate
xml.Oildex_Electronic_Tran.fieldNames - RecordType,Blank,RecordCount,NetVolume,NetValue,Blank1
 
Error received:
Exception Message: java.lang.Exception: java.lang.ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException: while trying to load from index 3 of an object array with length 3, loaded from local variable 'objects'@ line 907 in script3.groovy
 
Expected output - Record with ID 7 will repeat several times followed by its summary starting with 8 and finally file ends with record id 9

Expected output: File should be created with N number of records with 7 as id - (Details) each set of 7 records will end with a 8 (Summary Record) and finally file will end with record 9.

Today I receive the following error: Exception Message: java.lang.Exception: java.lang.ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException: while trying to load from index 3 of an object array with length 3, loaded from local variable 'objects'@ line 907 in script3.groovy

 

What could be the issue please comment. 

 

Thanks, 
SB

entry.title: Browser Cache Logon Issue
entry.content: Our quality instance has 3 clients.  When a user is in one QS instance client called 100 and logs out and then opens another URL in the same QS instance but different client called 200 the system logs them in like they are in the second URL client but they are still actually in the first client.  If we clear the browser cache it corrects this issue.  We are using Azure SSO to authenticate.  We temporarily created a script for the user to run that clears their browser cache and then opens the URL but this is not a long term solution.  Has anyone run across this and how have you resolved it?

entry.content:
When I try to define a default check rule, it shows me another error message. I hope you can help me.

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: First specify the default check rule for the new cred...
entry.content: ddd

entry.title: SAP Code Jam: Build AI services using the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, SAP AI Core and S
entry.content:
We are planning on hosting an SAP Code Jam with a tentative date of Friday April 25th in Newtown Square covering CAP, SAP AI Core and Gen AI Hub. Please share and invite your friends and let us know how much interest we have.

Any questions, please ask them here!

Overview

This CodeJam introduces attendees to aspects of exposing generative artificial intelligence (genAI) capabilities to execute tasks using a given business context.

During this event, you'll become acquainted with the theory behind genAI, SAP AI Core, SAP AI Launchpad, and learn how to use the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model to expose AI capabilities through your own OData service.

While working through the exercises, you'll become comfortable creating CDS-based service definitions and integrating them into the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and SAP AI Core Foundation Models.

entry.title: Re: Universal ID Problem with Linked Accounts
entry.content: Worked.! Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to generate your SAP Datasphere documentation aut...
entry.content: Hello. One question. Does the tool automatically generate the documentation? If so, can you share the step-by-step instructions with us?

entry.title: Contract deactivation in REFX if Asset has no postings
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

Is there a way in RE-FX module to Deactivate the Contract.

My contract is very old (2022) and the Asset assigned to it has no postings.

I cannot see the Contract in the list of those included in RECEASSETDEACT as it is considered "not deactivable".

I need the Asset Master Data contain the Deactivation Date.  I tried with ABVN but the Error Message REEXAA 024 (Asset &1 is assigned lease &2. Posting not possible.) is triggered.

I would not downgrade the Message from Error to Warning.

Is there another possibility to deactivate in REFX transactions.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Proration and Number Formats in Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hi @fares-fares 

As you can see in my first screenshot above the number format (defPercent) applied to the Proration field should be #,##0.00## and not #,##0.00

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Latest NEW 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻 Games 𝐈𝚗𝚟𝚒𝚝𝚎 𝘾𝙤𝙙𝙚?
entry.content: Here's The Code - hBJlF2664170
